description: Composition Green round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short puffed sleeves, ruched neckline and netted floral embellishment on the left side of the neckline Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach or iron on print Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed This doodle top is designed to make your little bundle of mischief look cute while she stays comfortable all day with the cotton fabric. The hue is a tribute to her girlish sweetness, while the embellishment showcases her love for all things floral. Pair it with a denim skirt and sandals for unbridled comfort.
